guidance_detail: FY2026 adjusted EPS raised to above $18.25 (modest increase); MCR 83.9% (improved from 84.8%); ~10% Medicare Advantage medical cost trend assumed.
risk_factors: Medicaid: expects membership attrition and negative margins in 2026
Elevated medical cost trend (~10% Medicare Advantage)
Regulatory: PBM legislation + Tennessee pharmacy law (~150k specialty patients)
